tEn: DeepLab: Semantic Image Segmentation with Deep Convolutional Nets, Atrous Convolution, and Fully Connected CRFs
tZh: DeepLab：基于深度卷积网络、空洞卷积和全连接条件随机场的语义图像分割
sEn: DeepLab combines atrous convolution, ASPP, and fully connected CRFs to achieve state-of-the-art semantic segmentation.
sZh: DeepLab结合空洞卷积、ASPP和全连接CRF，实现了语义分割的最新成果。
absEn: In this work we address the task of semantic image segmentation with Deep Learning and make three main contributions that are experimentally shown to have substantial practical merit. First, we highlight convolution with upsampled filters, or 'atrous convolution', as a powerful tool in dense prediction tasks. Atrous convolution allows us to explicitly control the resolution at which feature responses are computed within Deep Convolutional Neural Networks. It also allows us to effectively enlarge the field of view of filters to incorporate larger context without increasing the number of parameters or the amount of computation. Second, we propose atrous spatial pyramid pooling (ASPP) to robustly segment objects at multiple scales. ASPP probes an incoming convolutional feature layer with filters at multiple sampling rates and effective fields-of-views, thus capturing objects as well as image context at multiple scales. Third, we improve the localization of object boundaries by combining methods from DCNNs and probabilistic graphical models. The commonly deployed combination of max-pooling and downsampling in DCNNs achieves invariance but has a toll on localization accuracy. We overcome this by combining the responses at the final DCNN layer with a fully connected Conditional Random Field (CRF), which is shown both qualitatively and quantitatively to improve localization performance. Our proposed "DeepLab" system sets the new state-of-art at the PASCAL VOC-2012 semantic image segmentation task, reaching 79.7% mIOU in the test set, and advances the results on three other datasets: PASCAL-Context, PASCAL-Person-Part, and Cityscapes. All of our code is made publicly available online.
absZh: 本文利用深度学习解决语义图像分割任务，并做出三项具有实际价值的主要贡献。首先，我们强调使用上采样滤波器的卷积（即“空洞卷积”）作为密集预测任务中的强大工具。空洞卷积使我们能够显式控制深度卷积神经网络中特征响应的计算分辨率，同时有效扩大滤波器的视野以融入更大上下文，而不增加参数数量或计算量。其次，我们提出空洞空间金字塔池化（ASPP）以稳健地分割多尺度物体。ASPP使用多个采样率和有效视野的滤波器探测输入卷积特征层，从而捕获多尺度的物体及图像上下文。第三，我们通过结合深度卷积神经网络和概率图模型的方法，改进了物体边界的定位。深度卷积神经网络中常用的最大池化和下采样组合实现了不变性，但牺牲了定位精度。我们通过将最终深度卷积神经网络层的响应与全连接条件随机场（CRF）相结合来克服这一问题，定性和定量结果均表明定位性能得到提升。我们提出的“DeepLab”系统在PASCAL VOC-2012语义图像分割任务中达到了新的最优水平，测试集上mIOU为79.7%，并在其他三个数据集（PASCAL-Context、PASCAL-Person-Part和Cityscapes）上取得了更优结果。所有代码均已公开。

contrib.en: Proposed atrous convolution for dense feature extraction in DCNNs, controlling resolution without increasing parameters.
contrib.zh: 提出空洞卷积用于DCNN密集特征提取，在不增加参数的情况下控制分辨率。

contrib.en: Introduced Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) to robustly segment objects at multiple scales.
contrib.zh: 引入空洞空间金字塔池化（ASPP），以鲁棒地分割多尺度物体。

contrib.en: Combined DCNN with fully connected CRF to improve object boundary localization.
contrib.zh: 将DCNN与全连接条件随机场结合，改善物体边界定位。

contrib.en: Achieved state-of-the-art results on PASCAL VOC 2012, PASCAL-Context, PASCAL-Person-Part, and Cityscapes.
contrib.zh: 在PASCAL VOC 2012、PASCAL-Context、PASCAL-Person-Part和Cityscapes上取得最先进结果。

contrib.en: Demonstrated that atrous convolution enlarges filter field-of-view without extra computation.
contrib.zh: 证明空洞卷积在不增加计算量的情况下扩大滤波器视野。

contrib.en: Showed that CRF post-processing refines segmentation boundaries and removes false positives.
contrib.zh: 表明CRF后处理细化分割边界并去除假阳性。

limits.en: CRF used as post-processing, not jointly trained with DCNN, limiting end-to-end optimization.
limits.zh: CRF作为后处理，未与DCNN联合训练，限制了端到端优化。

limits.en: Method fails on fine object boundaries like bicycles and chairs due to low unary confidence.
limits.zh: 方法在自行车和椅子等精细物体边界上失败，因一元置信度低。

limits.en: High-resolution images require splitting into overlapped regions due to GPU memory limits.
limits.zh: 高分辨率图像因GPU内存限制需分割为重叠区域。

limits.en: Multiscale processing increases computation cost by processing multiple image scales.
limits.zh: 多尺度处理通过处理多个图像尺度增加了计算成本。

limits.en: Model relies on pre-trained ImageNet classifiers, which may not generalize to all domains.
limits.zh: 模型依赖预训练的ImageNet分类器，可能无法泛化到所有领域。

items.en: In this work we address the task of semantic image segmentation with Deep Learning and make three main contributions that are experimentally shown to have substantial practical merit. First, we highlight convolution with upsampled filters, or ‘atrous convolution’, as a powerful tool in dense prediction tasks. Atrous convolution allows us to explicitly control the resolution at which feature responses are computed within Deep Convolutional Neural Networks. It also allows us to effectively enlarge the field of view of filters to incorporate larger context without increasing the number of parameters or the amount of computation. Second, we propose atrous spatial pyramid pooling (ASPP) to robustly segment objects at multiple scales. ASPP probes an incoming convolutional feature layer with filters at multiple sampling rates and effective fields-of-views, thus capturing objects as well as image context at multiple scales. Third, we improve the localization of object boundaries by combining methods from DCNNs and probabilistic graphical models. The commonly deployed combination of max-pooling and downsampling in DCNNs achieves invariance but has a toll on localization accuracy. We overcome this by combining the responses at the final DCNN layer with a fully connected Conditional Random Field (CRF), which is shown both qualitatively and quantitatively to improve localization performance. Our proposed “DeepLab” system sets the new state-of-art at the PASCAL VOC-2012 semantic image segmentation task, reaching 79.7% mIOU in the test set, and advances the results on three other datasets: PASCAL-Context, PASCAL-Person-Part, and Cityscapes. All of our code is made publicly available online.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们处理了基于深度学习的语义图像分割任务，并做出了三个主要贡献，实验证明这些贡献具有重要的实际价值。首先，我们强调了使用上采样滤波器的卷积，即“空洞卷积”，作为密集预测任务中的强大工具。空洞卷积使我们能够显式控制深度卷积神经网络中特征响应的计算分辨率。它还使我们能够有效扩大滤波器的视野，以纳入更大的上下文，而无需增加参数数量或计算量。其次，我们提出了空洞空间金字塔池化（ASPP），以稳健地分割多尺度的对象。ASPP使用多个采样率和有效视野的滤波器探测输入的卷积特征层，从而捕获多尺度的对象以及图像上下文。第三，我们通过结合DCNN和概率图模型的方法改进了对象边界的定位。DCNN中常用的最大池化和下采样组合实现了不变性，但对定位精度造成了损失。我们通过将最终DCNN层的响应与全连接条件随机场（CRF）相结合来克服这一问题，定性和定量结果均表明这提高了定位性能。我们提出的“DeepLab”系统在PASCAL VOC-2012语义图像分割任务上达到了新的最先进水平，在测试集上达到79.7%的mIOU，并在其他三个数据集上取得了进展：PASCAL-Context、PASCAL-Person-Part和Cityscapes。我们的所有代码均在线公开。

items.en: Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNNs) [1] have pushed the performance of computer vision systems to soaring heights on a broad array of high-level problems, including image classification [2, 3, 4, 5, 6] and object detection [7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12], where DCNNs trained in an end-to-end manner have delivered strikingly better results than systems relying on hand-crafted features. Essential to this success is the built-in invariance of DCNNs to local image transformations, which allows them to learn increasingly abstract data representations [13]. This invariance is clearly desirable for classification tasks, but can hamper dense prediction tasks such as semantic segmentation, where abstraction of spatial information is undesired.
items.zh: 深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）[1]在广泛的视觉高级问题上推动了计算机视觉系统的性能达到新高度，包括图像分类[2, 3, 4, 5, 6]和对象检测[7, 8, 9, 10, 11, 12]，其中端到端训练的DCNN比依赖手工特征的系统取得了显著更好的结果。这一成功的关键在于DCNN对局部图像变换的内置不变性，使其能够学习越来越抽象的数据表示[13]。这种不变性对于分类任务显然是可取的，但可能会阻碍密集预测任务（如语义分割），因为空间信息的抽象是不希望的。

items.en: In particular we consider three challenges in the application of DCNNs to semantic image segmentation: (1) reduced feature resolution, (2) existence of objects at multiple scales, and (3) reduced localization accuracy due to DCNN invariance. Next, we discuss these challenges and our approach to overcome them in our proposed DeepLab system.
items.zh: 具体来说，我们考虑了将DCNN应用于语义图像分割时的三个挑战：（1）特征分辨率降低，（2）存在多尺度的对象，以及（3）由于DCNN的不变性导致的定位精度降低。接下来，我们讨论这些挑战以及我们在提出的DeepLab系统中克服它们的方法。

items.en: The first challenge is caused by the repeated combination of max-pooling and downsampling (‘striding’) performed at consecutive layers of DCNNs originally designed for image classification [2, 4, 5]. This results in feature maps with significantly reduced spatial resolution when the DCNN is employed in a fully convolutional fashion [14]. In order to overcome this hurdle and efficiently produce denser feature maps, we remove the downsampling operator from the last few max pooling layers of DCNNs and instead upsample the filters in subsequent convolutional layers, resulting in feature maps computed at a higher sampling rate. Filter upsampling amounts to inserting holes (‘trous’ in French) between nonzero filter taps. This technique has a long history in signal processing, originally developed for the efficient computation of the undecimated wavelet transform in a scheme also known as “algorithme à trous” [15]. We use the term atrous convolution as a shorthand for convolution with upsampled filters. Various flavors of this idea have been used before in the context of DCNNs by [16, 3, 6]. In practice, we recover full resolution feature maps by a combination of atrous convolution, which computes feature maps more densely, followed by simple bilinear interpolation of the feature responses to the original image size. This scheme offers a simple yet powerful alternative to using deconvolutional layers [13, 14] in dense prediction tasks. Compared to regular convolution with larger filters, atrous convolution allows us to effectively enlarge the field of view of filters without increasing the number of parameters or the amount of computation.
items.zh: 第一个挑战是由最初为图像分类设计的DCNN[2, 4, 5]的连续层中重复进行的最大池化和下采样（“步长”）组合引起的。当以全卷积方式使用DCNN时[14]，这导致特征图的空间分辨率显著降低。为了克服这一障碍并高效生成更密集的特征图，我们移除了DCNN最后几个最大池化层的下采样操作，而是对后续卷积层中的滤波器进行上采样，从而以更高的采样率计算特征图。滤波器上采样相当于在非零滤波器抽头之间插入孔洞（法语中称为“trous”）。该技术在信号处理中有着悠久的历史，最初是为了在也称为“algorithme à trous”[15]的方案中高效计算非下采样小波变换而开发的。我们使用术语“空洞卷积”作为上采样滤波器卷积的简称。在DCNN的背景下，[16, 3, 6]之前已经使用过该思想的各种变体。在实践中，我们通过结合空洞卷积（更密集地计算特征图）和简单的双线性插值（将特征响应恢复到原始图像大小）来恢复全分辨率特征图。该方案为密集预测任务中的反卷积层[13, 14]提供了一种简单而强大的替代方案。与使用更大滤波器的常规卷积相比，空洞卷积使我们能够有效扩大滤波器的视野，而无需增加参数数量或计算量。

items.en: The second challenge is caused by the existence of objects at multiple scales. A standard way to deal with this is to present to the DCNN rescaled versions of the same image and then aggregate the feature or score maps [6, 17, 18]. We show that this approach indeed increases the performance of our system, but comes at the cost of computing feature responses at all DCNN layers for multiple scaled versions of the input image. Instead, motivated by spatial pyramid pooling [19, 20], we propose a computationally efficient scheme of resampling a given feature layer at multiple rates prior to convolution. This amounts to probing the original image with multiple filters that have complementary effective fields of view, thus capturing objects as well as useful image context at multiple scales. Rather than actually resampling features, we efficiently implement this mapping using multiple parallel atrous convolutional layers with different sampling rates; we call the proposed technique “atrous spatial pyramid pooling” (ASPP).
items.zh: 第二个挑战是由多尺度对象的存在引起的。处理此问题的标准方法是将同一图像的缩放版本输入DCNN，然后聚合特征或得分图[6, 17, 18]。我们表明这种方法确实提高了我们系统的性能，但代价是需要为输入图像的多个缩放版本计算所有DCNN层的特征响应。相反，受空间金字塔池化[19, 20]的启发，我们提出了一种计算高效的方案，即在卷积之前以多种速率对给定特征层进行重采样。这相当于使用多个具有互补有效视野的滤波器探测原始图像，从而捕获多尺度的对象以及有用的图像上下文。我们不是实际重采样特征，而是使用多个具有不同采样率的并行空洞卷积层来高效实现这种映射；我们将所提出的技术称为“空洞空间金字塔池化”（ASPP）。

items.en: The third challenge relates to the fact that an object-centric classifier requires invariance to spatial transformations, inherently limiting the spatial accuracy of a DCNN. One way to mitigate this problem is to use skip-layers to extract “hyper-column” features from multiple network layers when computing the final segmentation result [21, 14]. Our work explores an alternative approach which we show to be highly effective. In particular, we boost our model’s ability to capture fine details by employing a fully-connected Conditional Random Field (CRF) [22]. CRFs have been broadly used in semantic segmentation to combine class scores computed by multi-way classifiers with the low-level information captured by the local interactions of pixels and edges [23, 24] or superpixels [25]. Even though works of increased sophistication have been proposed to model the hierarchical dependency [26, 27, 28] and/or high-order dependencies of segments [29, 30, 31, 32, 33], we use the fully connected pairwise CRF proposed by [22] for its efficient computation, and ability to capture fine edge details while also catering for long range dependencies. That model was shown in [22] to improve the performance of a boosting-based pixel-level classifier. In this work, we demonstrate that it leads to state-of-the-art results when coupled with a DCNN-based pixel-level classifier.
items.zh: 第三个挑战与以下事实相关：以对象为中心的分类器需要空间变换的不变性，这固有地限制了DCNN的空间精度。缓解此问题的一种方法是使用跳跃层从多个网络层提取“超列”特征，以计算最终分割结果[21, 14]。我们的工作探索了一种替代方法，我们证明该方法非常有效。具体来说，我们通过使用全连接条件随机场（CRF）[22]来增强模型捕获细节的能力。CRF已广泛用于语义分割，以将多路分类器计算的类别分数与像素和边的局部交互[23, 24]或超像素[25]捕获的低层信息相结合。尽管已经提出了更复杂的模型来建模层次依赖[26, 27, 28]和/或片段的高阶依赖[29, 30, 31, 32, 33]，但我们使用[22]提出的全连接成对CRF，因为它计算高效，并且能够捕获精细的边缘细节，同时还能处理长程依赖。该模型在[22]中被证明可以提高基于提升的像素级分类器的性能。在这项工作中，我们证明当与基于DCNN的像素级分类器结合时，它能够达到最先进的结果。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Model Illustration. A Deep Convolutional Neural Network such as VGG-16 or ResNet-101 is employed in a fully convolutional fashion, using atrous convolution to reduce the degree of signal downsampling (from 32x down 8x). A bilinear interpolation stage enlarges the feature maps to the original image resolution. A fully connected CRF is then applied to refine the segmentation result and better capture the object boundaries.
items.capZh: 图1：模型示意图。采用全卷积方式使用深度卷积神经网络（如VGG-16或ResNet-101），使用空洞卷积来降低信号下采样程度（从32倍降至8倍）。双线性插值阶段将特征图放大到原始图像分辨率。然后应用全连接CRF来细化分割结果并更好地捕获对象边界。

items.en: A high-level illustration of the proposed DeepLab model is shown in Fig. 1. A deep convolutional neural network (VGG-16 [4] or ResNet-101 [11] in this work) trained in the task of image classification is re-purposed to the task of semantic segmentation by (1) transforming all the fully connected layers to convolutional layers (i.e., fully convolutional network [14]) and (2) increasing feature resolution through atrous convolutional layers, allowing us to compute feature responses every 8 pixels instead of every 32 pixels in the original network. We then employ bi-linear interpolation to upsample by a factor of 8 the score map to reach the original image resolution, yielding the input to a fully-connected CRF [22] that refines the segmentation results.
items.zh: 图1展示了所提出的DeepLab模型的高级示意图。通过以下方式，将用于图像分类任务的深度卷积神经网络（本文中为VGG-16 [4]或ResNet-101 [11]）重新用于语义分割任务：（1）将所有全连接层转换为卷积层（即全卷积网络[14]），以及（2）通过空洞卷积层提高特征分辨率，使我们能够每8个像素而不是原始网络中的每32个像素计算特征响应。然后，我们使用双线性插值将得分图上采样8倍以达到原始图像分辨率，得到输入到全连接CRF [22]的结果，该CRF细化分割结果。

items.en: From a practical standpoint, the three main advantages of our DeepLab system are: (1) Speed: by virtue of atrous convolution, our dense DCNN operates at 8 FPS on an NVidia Titan X GPU, while Mean Field Inference for the fully-connected CRF requires 0.5 secs on a CPU. (2) Accuracy: we obtain state-of-art results on several challenging datasets, including the PASCAL VOC 2012 semantic segmentation benchmark [34], PASCAL-Context [35], PASCAL-Person-Part [36], and Cityscapes [37]. (3) Simplicity: our system is composed of a cascade of two very well-established modules, DCNNs and CRFs.
items.zh: 从实践角度来看，我们的DeepLab系统的三个主要优点是：（1）速度：通过空洞卷积，我们的密集DCNN在NVidia Titan X GPU上以8 FPS运行，而全连接CRF的平均场推理在CPU上需要0.5秒。（2）准确性：我们在多个具有挑战性的数据集上获得了最先进的结果，包括PASCAL VOC 2012语义分割基准[34]、PASCAL-Context [35]、PASCAL-Person-Part [36]和Cityscapes [37]。（3）简单性：我们的系统由两个非常成熟的模块级联组成：DCNN和CRF。

items.en: The updated DeepLab system we present in this paper features several improvements compared to its first version reported in our original conference publication [38]. Our new version can better segment objects at multiple scales, via either multi-scale input processing [39, 40, 17] or the proposed ASPP. We have built a residual net variant of DeepLab by adapting the state-of-art ResNet [11] image classification DCNN, achieving better semantic segmentation performance compared to our original model based on VGG-16 [4]. Finally, we present a more comprehensive experimental evaluation of multiple model variants and report state-of-art results not only on the PASCAL VOC 2012 benchmark but also on other challenging tasks. We have implemented the proposed methods by extending the Caffe framework [41]. We share our code and models at a companion web site http://liangchiehchen.com/projects/DeepLab.html.
items.zh: 本文中介绍的更新版DeepLab系统与我们在原始会议论文[38]中报告的第一个版本相比，具有多项改进。我们的新版本可以通过多尺度输入处理[39, 40, 17]或提出的ASPP更好地分割多尺度对象。我们通过调整最先进的ResNet [11]图像分类DCNN构建了DeepLab的残差网络变体，与基于VGG-16 [4]的原始模型相比，实现了更好的语义分割性能。最后，我们对多个模型变体进行了更全面的实验评估，并报告了不仅在PASCAL VOC 2012基准上，而且在其他具有挑战性的任务上的最先进结果。我们通过扩展Caffe框架[41]实现了所提出的方法。我们在配套网站http://liangchiehchen.com/projects/DeepLab.html上共享我们的代码和模型。

items.en: Most of the successful semantic segmentation systems developed in the previous decade relied on hand-crafted features combined with flat classifiers, such as Boosting [42, 24], Random Forests [43], or Support Vector Machines [44]. Substantial improvements have been achieved by incorporating richer information from context [45] and structured prediction techniques [26, 27, 46, 22], but the performance of these systems has always been compromised by the limited expressive power of the features. Over the past few years the breakthroughs of Deep Learning in image classification were quickly transferred to the semantic segmentation task. Since this task involves both segmentation and classification, a central question is how to combine the two tasks.
items.zh: 过去十年中开发的大多数成功的语义分割系统依赖于手工特征与平面分类器的结合，例如Boosting [42, 24]、随机森林[43]或支持向量机[44]。通过整合来自上下文[45]和结构化预测技术[26, 27, 46, 22]的更丰富信息，取得了实质性改进，但这些系统的性能始终受到特征表达能力有限的制约。在过去几年中，深度学习在图像分类方面的突破迅速转移到语义分割任务。由于该任务涉及分割和分类，一个核心问题是如何将这两个任务结合起来。

items.en: The first family of DCNN-based systems for semantic segmentation typically employs a cascade of bottom-up image segmentation, followed by DCNN-based region classification. For instance the bounding box proposals and masked regions delivered by [47, 48] are used in [7] and [49] as inputs to a DCNN to incorporate shape information into the classification process. Similarly, the authors of [50] rely on a superpixel representation. Even though these approaches can benefit from the sharp boundaries delivered by a good segmentation, they also cannot recover from any of its errors.
items.zh: 第一类基于DCNN的语义分割系统通常采用自底向上的图像分割级联，然后进行基于DCNN的区域分类。例如，[7]和[49]使用[47, 48]提供的边界框提议和掩码区域作为DCNN的输入，以将形状信息纳入分类过程。类似地，[50]的作者依赖于超像素表示。尽管这些方法可以从良好分割提供的清晰边界中受益，但它们也无法从其任何错误中恢复。

items.en: The second family of works relies on using convolutionally computed DCNN features for dense image labeling, and couples them with segmentations that are obtained independently. Among the first have been [39] who apply DCNNs at multiple image resolutions and then employ a segmentation tree to smooth the prediction results. More recently, [21] propose to use skip layers and concatenate the computed intermediate feature maps within the DCNNs for pixel classification. Further, [51] propose to pool the intermediate feature maps by region proposals. These works still employ segmentation algorithms that are decoupled from the DCNN classifier’s results, thus risking commitment to premature decisions.
items.zh: 第二类工作依赖于使用卷积计算的DCNN特征进行密集图像标记，并将其与独立获得的分割相结合。最早的有[39]，他们在多个图像分辨率下应用DCNN，然后使用分割树来平滑预测结果。最近，[21]提出使用跳跃层并连接DCNN内计算的中间特征图用于像素分类。此外，[51]提出通过区域提议池化中间特征图。这些工作仍然使用与DCNN分类器结果解耦的分割算法，因此有承诺于过早决策的风险。

items.en: The third family of works uses DCNNs to directly provide dense category-level pixel labels, which makes it possible to even discard segmentation altogether. The segmentation-free approaches of [14, 52] directly apply DCNNs to the whole image in a fully convolutional fashion, transforming the last fully connected layers of the DCNN into convolutional layers. In order to deal with the spatial localization issues outlined in the introduction, [14] upsample and concatenate the scores from intermediate feature maps, while [52] refine the prediction result from coarse to fine by propagating the coarse results to another DCNN. Our work builds on these works, and as described in the introduction extends them by exerting control on the feature resolution, introducing multi-scale pooling techniques and integrating the densely connected CRF of [22] on top of the DCNN. We show that this leads to significantly better segmentation results, especially along object boundaries. The combination of DCNN and CRF is of course not new but previous works only tried locally connected CRF models. Specifically, [53] use CRFs as a proposal mechanism for a DCNN-based reranking system, while [39] treat superpixels as nodes for a local pairwise CRF and use graph-cuts for discrete inference. As such their models were limited by errors in superpixel computations or ignored long-range dependencies. Our approach instead treats every pixel as a CRF node receiving unary potentials by the DCNN. Crucially, the Gaussian CRF potentials in the fully connected CRF model of [22] that we adopt can capture long-range dependencies and at the same time the model is amenable to fast mean field inference. We note that mean field inference had been extensively studied for traditional image segmentation tasks [54, 55, 56], but these older models were typically limited to short-range connections. In independent work, [57] use a very similar densely connected CRF model to refine the results of DCNN for the problem of material classification. However, the DCNN module of [57] was only trained by sparse point supervision instead of dense supervision at every pixel.
items.zh: 第三类工作使用DCNN直接提供密集的类别级像素标签，这使得甚至可以完全丢弃分割。[14, 52]的无分割方法以全卷积方式直接将DCNN应用于整个图像，将DCNN的最后全连接层转换为卷积层。为了解决引言中概述的空间定位问题，[14]对来自中间特征图的得分进行上采样和连接，而[52]通过将粗略结果传播到另一个DCNN来从粗到细细化预测结果。我们的工作建立在这些工作的基础上，并如引言所述，通过控制特征分辨率、引入多尺度池化技术以及在DCNN之上集成[22]的密集连接CRF来扩展它们。我们表明，这导致了显著更好的分割结果，尤其是在对象边界处。DCNN和CRF的组合当然不是新的，但以前的工作只尝试了局部连接的CRF模型。具体来说，[53]使用CRF作为基于DCNN的重新排序系统的提议机制，而[39]将超像素视为局部成对CRF的节点，并使用图割进行离散推理。因此，它们的模型受到超像素计算错误或忽略长程依赖的限制。我们的方法相反，将每个像素视为CRF节点，接收来自DCNN的一元势。至关重要的是，我们采用的[22]的全连接CRF模型中的高斯CRF势可以捕获长程依赖，同时该模型适用于快速平均场推理。我们注意到，平均场推理已广泛研究用于传统图像分割任务[54, 55, 56]，但这些较旧的模型通常限于短程连接。在独立的工作中，[57]使用非常相似的密集连接CRF模型来细化DCNN的结果，用于材料分类问题。然而，[57]的DCNN模块仅通过稀疏点监督而不是每个像素的密集监督进行训练。

items.en: Since the first version of this work was made publicly available [38], the area of semantic segmentation has progressed drastically. Multiple groups have made important advances, significantly raising the bar on the PASCAL VOC 2012 semantic segmentation benchmark, as reflected to the high level of activity in the benchmark’s leaderboard111http://host.robots.ox.ac.uk:8080/leaderboard/displaylb.php?challengeid=11&compid=6 [58, 59, 60, 61, 62, 40, 17, 63]. Interestingly, most top-performing methods have adopted one or both of the key ingredients of our DeepLab system: Atrous convolution for efficient dense feature extraction and refinement of the raw DCNN scores by means of a fully connected CRF. We outline below some of the most important and interesting advances.
items.zh: 自从本工作的第一个版本公开[38]以来，语义分割领域取得了巨大进展。多个小组取得了重要进展，显著提高了PASCAL VOC 2012语义分割基准的门槛，这反映在基准排行榜上的高度活跃水平[58, 59, 60, 61, 62, 40, 17, 63]。有趣的是，大多数顶级方法都采用了我们DeepLab系统的一个或两个关键要素：用于高效密集特征提取的空洞卷积和通过全连接CRF细化原始DCNN得分。我们概述了一些最重要和有趣的进展。

items.en: End-to-end training for structured prediction has more recently been explored in several related works. While we employ the CRF as a post-processing method, [59, 64, 65, 62, 40] have successfully pursued joint learning of the DCNN and CRF. In particular, [59, 65] unroll the CRF mean-field inference steps to convert the whole system into an end-to-end trainable feed-forward network, while [62] approximates one iteration of the dense CRF mean field inference [22] by convolutional layers with learnable filters. Another fruitful direction pursued by [40, 66] is to learn the pairwise terms of a CRF via a DCNN, significantly improving performance at the cost of heavier computation. In a different direction, [63] replace the bilateral filtering module used in mean field inference with a faster domain transform module [67], improving the speed and lowering the memory requirements of the overall system, while [68, 18] combine semantic segmentation with edge detection.
items.zh: 最近，一些相关工作探索了结构化预测的端到端训练。虽然我们将CRF用作后处理方法，但[59, 64, 65, 62, 40]成功地进行了DCNN和CRF的联合学习。具体来说，[59, 65]展开CRF平均场推理步骤，将整个系统转换为端到端可训练的前馈网络，而[62]通过具有可学习滤波器的卷积层近似密集CRF平均场推理[22]的一次迭代。[40, 66]探索的另一个富有成效的方向是通过DCNN学习CRF的成对项，以更重的计算为代价显著提高性能。在另一个方向上，[63]用更快的域变换模块[67]替换了平均场推理中使用的双边滤波模块，提高了整个系统的速度并降低了内存需求，而[68, 18]将语义分割与边缘检测相结合。

items.en: Weaker supervision has been pursued in a number of papers, relaxing the assumption that pixel-level semantic annotations are available for the whole training set [69, 58, 70, 71], achieving significantly better results than weakly-supervised pre-DCNN systems such as [72]. In another line of research, [49, 73] pursue instance segmentation, jointly tackling object detection and semantic segmentation.
items.zh: 许多论文探索了弱监督，放宽了像素级语义标注可用于整个训练集的假设[69, 58, 70, 71]，取得了比弱监督预DCNN系统（如[72]）显著更好的结果。在另一条研究线上，[49, 73]追求实例分割，共同处理对象检测和语义分割。

items.en: What we call here atrous convolution was originally developed for the efficient computation of the undecimated wavelet transform in the “algorithme à trous” scheme of [15]. We refer the interested reader to [74] for early references from the wavelet literature. Atrous convolution is also intimately related to the “noble identities” in multi-rate signal processing, which builds on the same interplay of input signal and filter sampling rates [75]. Atrous convolution is a term we first used in [6]. The same operation was later called dilated convolution by [76], a term they coined motivated by the fact that the operation corresponds to regular convolution with upsampled (or dilated in the terminology of [15]) filters. Various authors have used the same operation before for denser feature extraction in DCNNs [16, 3, 6]. Beyond mere resolution enhancement, atrous convolution allows us to enlarge the field of view of filters to incorporate larger context, which we have shown in [38] to be beneficial. This approach has been pursued further by [76], who employ a series of atrous convolutional layers with increasing rates to aggregate multiscale context. The atrous spatial pyramid pooling scheme proposed here to capture multiscale objects and context also employs multiple atrous convolutional layers with different sampling rates, which we however lay out in parallel instead of in serial. Interestingly, the atrous convolution technique has also been adopted for a broader set of tasks, such as object detection [12, 77], instance-level segmentation [78], visual question answering [79], and optical flow [80].
items.zh: 我们这里所称的空洞卷积最初是为了在[15]的“algorithme à trous”方案中高效计算非下采样小波变换而开发的。我们推荐感兴趣的读者参考[74]以获取小波文献中的早期参考文献。空洞卷积也与多速率信号处理中的“高贵恒等式”密切相关，该恒等式建立在输入信号和滤波器采样率的相同相互作用上[75]。空洞卷积是我们首次在[6]中使用的术语。后来[76]将其称为膨胀卷积，他们提出这个术语是因为该操作对应于使用上采样（或在[15]的术语中为膨胀）滤波器的常规卷积。多位作者之前已经使用过相同的操作，用于DCNN中的更密集特征提取[16, 3, 6]。除了单纯的分辨率增强之外，空洞卷积使我们能够扩大滤波器的视野以纳入更大的上下文，我们在[38]中已证明这是有益的。[76]进一步采用了这种方法，他们使用一系列具有递增率的空洞卷积层来聚合多尺度上下文。本文提出的用于捕获多尺度对象和上下文的空洞空间金字塔池化方案也使用了多个具有不同采样率的空洞卷积层，但我们将其并行而非串行排列。有趣的是，空洞卷积技术也被用于更广泛的任务，例如对象检测[12, 77]、实例级分割[78]、视觉问答[79]和光流[80]。

items.en: We also show that, as expected, integrating into DeepLab more advanced image classification DCNNs such as the residual net of [11] leads to better results. This has also been observed independently by [81].
items.zh: 我们还表明，正如预期的那样，将更先进的图像分类DCNN（如[11]的残差网络）集成到DeepLab中会带来更好的结果。[81]也独立观察到了这一点。

full.sec: 3.1 Atrous Convolution for Dense Feature Extraction and Field-of-View Enlargement
full.secZh: 3.1 用于密集特征提取和视野扩大的空洞卷积

items.en: The use of DCNNs for semantic segmentation, or other dense prediction tasks, has been shown to be simply and successfully addressed by deploying DCNNs in a fully convolutional fashion [3, 14]. However, the repeated combination of max-pooling and striding at consecutive layers of these networks reduces significantly the spatial resolution of the resulting feature maps, typically by a factor of 32 across each direction in recent DCNNs. A partial remedy is to use ‘deconvolutional’ layers as in [14], which however requires additional memory and time.
items.zh: 使用DCNN进行语义分割或其他密集预测任务已被证明可以通过以全卷积方式部署DCNN来简单而成功地解决[3, 14]。然而，这些网络连续层中重复进行的最大池化和步长组合显著降低了所得特征图的空间分辨率，在最近的DCNN中通常每个方向降低32倍。部分补救措施是使用如[14]中的“反卷积”层，但这需要额外的内存和时间。

items.en: We advocate instead the use of atrous convolution, originally developed for the efficient computation of the undecimated wavelet transform in the “algorithme à trous” scheme of [15] and used before in the DCNN context by [16, 3, 6]. This algorithm allows us to compute the responses of any layer at any desirable resolution. It can be applied post-hoc, once a network has been trained, but can also be seamlessly integrated with training.
items.zh: 我们主张改用空洞卷积，该技术最初是为[15]中“算法à trous”方案中非下采样小波变换的高效计算而开发的，此前在DCNN背景下由[16, 3, 6]使用。该算法允许我们以任意期望的分辨率计算任何层的响应。它可以在网络训练后事后应用，也可以无缝集成到训练中。

items.zh: 首先考虑一维信号，一维输入信号x[i]与长度为K的滤波器w[k]的空洞卷积输出y[i]定义为：

items.en: The rate parameter r𝑟r corresponds to the stride with which we sample the input signal. Standard convolution is a special case for rate r=1𝑟1r=1. See Fig. 2 for illustration.
items.zh: 速率参数r对应于我们对输入信号进行采样的步长。标准卷积是速率r=1的特例。见图2的说明。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Illustration of atrous convolution in 1-D. (a) Sparse feature extraction with standard convolution on a low resolution input feature map. (b) Dense feature extraction with atrous convolution with rate r=2𝑟2r=2, applied on a high resolution input feature map.
items.capZh: 图2：一维空洞卷积示意图。(a) 在低分辨率输入特征图上使用标准卷积进行稀疏特征提取。(b) 在高分辨率输入特征图上使用速率r=2的空洞卷积进行密集特征提取。

items.en: We illustrate the algorithm’s operation in 2-D through a simple example in Fig. 3: Given an image, we assume that we first have a downsampling operation that reduces the resolution by a factor of 2, and then perform a convolution with a kernel - here, the vertical Gaussian derivative. If one implants the resulting feature map in the original image coordinates, we realize that we have obtained responses at only 1/4 of the image positions. Instead, we can compute responses at all image positions if we convolve the full resolution image with a filter ‘with holes’, in which we upsample the original filter by a factor of 2, and introduce zeros in between filter values. Although the effective filter size increases, we only need to take into account the non-zero filter values, hence both the number of filter parameters and the number of operations per position stay constant. The resulting scheme allows us to easily and explicitly control the spatial resolution of neural network feature responses.
items.zh: 我们通过图3中的一个简单示例来说明该算法在二维中的操作：给定一幅图像，我们假设首先进行下采样操作将分辨率降低2倍，然后使用一个核（此处为垂直高斯导数）进行卷积。如果将得到的特征图植入原始图像坐标中，我们会发现仅在1/4的图像位置获得了响应。相反，如果我们用“带孔”的滤波器对全分辨率图像进行卷积，其中将原始滤波器上采样2倍并在滤波器值之间引入零，则可以计算所有图像位置的响应。尽管有效滤波器尺寸增大，但我们只需考虑非零滤波器值，因此滤波器参数数量和每个位置的操作数量都保持不变。由此产生的方案使我们能够轻松且明确地控制神经网络特征响应的空间分辨率。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Illustration of atrous convolution in 2-D. Top row: sparse feature extraction with standard convolution on a low resolution input feature map. Bottom row: Dense feature extraction with atrous convolution with rate r=2𝑟2r=2, applied on a high resolution input feature map.
items.capZh: 图3：二维空洞卷积示意图。上一行：在低分辨率输入特征图上使用标准卷积进行稀疏特征提取。下一行：在高分辨率输入特征图上使用速率r=2的空洞卷积进行密集特征提取。

items.en: In the context of DCNNs one can use atrous convolution in a chain of layers, effectively allowing us to compute the final DCNN network responses at an arbitrarily high resolution. For example, in order to double the spatial density of computed feature responses in the VGG-16 or ResNet-101 networks, we find the last pooling or convolutional layer that decreases resolution (’pool5’ or ’conv5_1’ respectively), set its stride to 1 to avoid signal decimation, and replace all subsequent convolutional layers with atrous convolutional layers having rate r=2𝑟2r=2. Pushing this approach all the way through the network could allow us to compute feature responses at the original image resolution, but this ends up being too costly. We have adopted instead a hybrid approach that strikes a good efficiency/accuracy trade-off, using atrous convolution to increase by a factor of 4 the density of computed feature maps, followed by fast bilinear interpolation by an additional factor of 8 to recover feature maps at the original image resolution. Bilinear interpolation is sufficient in this setting because the class score maps (corresponding to log-probabilities) are quite smooth, as illustrated in Fig. 5. Unlike the deconvolutional approach adopted by [14], the proposed approach converts image classification networks into dense feature extractors without requiring learning any extra parameters, leading to faster DCNN training in practice.
items.zh: 在DCNN的背景下，可以在层链中使用空洞卷积，从而有效地以任意高的分辨率计算最终的DCNN网络响应。例如，为了将VGG-16或ResNet-101网络中计算的特征响应的空间密度加倍，我们找到最后一个降低分辨率的池化层或卷积层（分别为'pool5'或'conv5_1'），将其步长设置为1以避免信号抽取，并将所有后续卷积层替换为速率r=2的空洞卷积层。将这种方法一直推送到网络末端，可以让我们以原始图像分辨率计算特征响应，但这最终成本过高。我们转而采用了一种混合方法，在效率与精度之间取得了良好的平衡，使用空洞卷积将计算的特征图密度提高4倍，然后通过快速双线性插值再增加8倍，以恢复原始图像分辨率的特征图。在这种情况下，双线性插值就足够了，因为类别得分图（对应于对数概率）相当平滑，如图5所示。与[14]采用的反卷积方法不同，所提出的方法将图像分类网络转换为密集特征提取器，无需学习任何额外参数，从而在实践中加快了DCNN训练。

items.en: Atrous convolution also allows us to arbitrarily enlarge the field-of-view of filters at any DCNN layer. State-of-the-art DCNNs typically employ spatially small convolution kernels (typically 3×3333\!\times\!3) in order to keep both computation and number of parameters contained. Atrous convolution with rate r𝑟r introduces r−1𝑟1r-1 zeros between consecutive filter values, effectively enlarging the kernel size of a k×k𝑘𝑘k\!\times\!k filter to ke=k+(k−1)​(r−1)subscript𝑘𝑒𝑘𝑘1𝑟1k_{e}=k+(k-1)(r-1) without increasing the number of parameters or the amount of computation. It thus offers an efficient mechanism to control the field-of-view and finds the best trade-off between accurate localization (small field-of-view) and context assimilation (large field-of-view). We have successfully experimented with this technique: Our DeepLab-LargeFOV model variant [38] employs atrous convolution with rate r=12𝑟12r=12 in VGG-16 ‘fc6’ layer with significant performance gains, as detailed in Section 4.
items.zh: 空洞卷积还允许我们在任何DCNN层任意扩大滤波器的视野。最先进的DCNN通常使用空间上较小的卷积核（通常为3×3），以控制计算量和参数数量。速率为r的空洞卷积在连续滤波器值之间引入r-1个零，从而将k×k滤波器的核大小有效增大到ke = k + (k-1)(r-1)，而无需增加参数数量或计算量。因此，它提供了一种控制视野的有效机制，并在精确定位（小视野）和上下文整合（大视野）之间找到最佳权衡。我们已成功试验了该技术：我们的DeepLab-LargeFOV模型变体[38]在VGG-16的'fc6'层使用速率为r=12的空洞卷积，取得了显著的性能提升，详见第4节。

items.en: Turning to implementation aspects, there are two efficient ways to perform atrous convolution. The first is to implicitly upsample the filters by inserting holes (zeros), or equivalently sparsely sample the input feature maps [15]. We implemented this in our earlier work [6, 38], followed by [76], within the Caffe framework [41] by adding to the im2col function (it extracts vectorized patches from multi-channel feature maps) the option to sparsely sample the underlying feature maps. The second method, originally proposed by [82] and used in [16, 3] is to subsample the input feature map by a factor equal to the atrous convolution rate r𝑟r, deinterlacing it to produce r2superscript𝑟2r^{2} reduced resolution maps, one for each of the r×r𝑟𝑟r\!\times\!r possible shifts. This is followed by applying standard convolution to these intermediate feature maps and reinterlacing them to the original image resolution. By reducing atrous convolution into regular convolution, it allows us to use off-the-shelf highly optimized convolution routines. We have implemented the second approach into the TensorFlow framework [83].
items.zh: 在实现方面，有两种有效的方法来执行空洞卷积。第一种是通过插入孔（零）来隐式上采样滤波器，或者等效地对输入特征图进行稀疏采样[15]。我们在早期工作[6, 38]中实现了这一点，随后[76]在Caffe框架[41]中通过在im2col函数（从多通道特征图中提取向量化块）中添加对底层特征图进行稀疏采样的选项来实现。第二种方法最初由[82]提出，并由[16, 3]使用，即对输入特征图进行因子等于空洞卷积速率r的下采样，将其解交织产生r^2个降分辨率图，每个对应r×r个可能的偏移之一。然后对这些中间特征图应用标准卷积，并将其重新交织回原始图像分辨率。通过将空洞卷积简化为常规卷积，它允许我们使用现成的高度优化的卷积例程。我们已在TensorFlow框架[83]中实现了第二种方法。

full.sec: 3.2 Multiscale Image Representations using Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling
full.secZh: 3.2 使用空洞空间金字塔池化的多尺度图像表示

items.en: DCNNs have shown a remarkable ability to implicitly represent scale, simply by being trained on datasets that contain objects of varying size. Still, explicitly accounting for object scale can improve the DCNN’s ability to successfully handle both large and small objects [6].
items.zh: DCNN已经显示出一种显著的能力，即通过简单地训练包含不同大小对象的数据集来隐式表示尺度。尽管如此，显式考虑对象尺度可以提高DCNN成功处理大小对象的能力[6]。

items.en: We have experimented with two approaches to handling scale variability in semantic segmentation. The first approach amounts to standard multiscale processing [17, 18]. We extract DCNN score maps from multiple (three in our experiments) rescaled versions of the original image using parallel DCNN branches that share the same parameters. To produce the final result, we bilinearly interpolate the feature maps from the parallel DCNN branches to the original image resolution and fuse them, by taking at each position the maximum response across the different scales. We do this both during training and testing. Multiscale processing significantly improves performance, but at the cost of computing feature responses at all DCNN layers for multiple scales of input.
items.zh: 我们试验了两种处理语义分割中尺度可变性的方法。第一种方法相当于标准的多尺度处理[17, 18]。我们使用共享相同参数的并行DCNN分支，从原始图像的多个（在我们的实验中为三个）缩放版本中提取DCNN得分图。为了生成最终结果，我们将并行DCNN分支的特征图双线性插值到原始图像分辨率，并通过在每个位置取不同尺度上的最大响应来融合它们。我们在训练和测试中都这样做。多尺度处理显著提高了性能，但代价是为输入的多个尺度计算所有DCNN层的特征响应。

items.en: The second approach is inspired by the success of the R-CNN spatial pyramid pooling method of [20], which showed that regions of an arbitrary scale can be accurately and efficiently classified by resampling convolutional features extracted at a single scale. We have implemented a variant of their scheme which uses multiple parallel atrous convolutional layers with different sampling rates. The features extracted for each sampling rate are further processed in separate branches and fused to generate the final result. The proposed “atrous spatial pyramid pooling” (DeepLab-ASPP) approach generalizes our DeepLab-LargeFOV variant and is illustrated in Fig. 4.
items.zh: 第二种方法受到R-CNN空间金字塔池化方法[20]成功的启发，该方法表明，通过重新采样在单一尺度上提取的卷积特征，可以准确且高效地对任意尺度的区域进行分类。我们实现了他们方案的一个变体，该变体使用多个具有不同采样率的并行空洞卷积层。每个采样率提取的特征在单独的分支中进一步处理并融合以生成最终结果。所提出的“空洞空间金字塔池化”（DeepLab-ASPP）方法推广了我们的DeepLab-LargeFOV变体，如图4所示。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP). To classify the center pixel (orange), ASPP exploits multi-scale features by employing multiple parallel filters with different rates. The effective Field-Of-Views are shown in different colors.
items.capZh: 图4：空洞空间金字塔池化（ASPP）。为了对中心像素（橙色）进行分类，ASPP通过使用多个具有不同速率的并行滤波器来利用多尺度特征。有效视野以不同颜色显示。

full.sec: 3.3 Structured Prediction with Fully-Connected Conditional Random Fields for Accurate Boundary Recovery
full.secZh: 3.3 基于全连接条件随机场的结构化预测实现精确边界恢复

items.en: A trade-off between localization accuracy and classification performance seems to be inherent in DCNNs: deeper models with multiple max-pooling layers have proven most successful in classification tasks, however the increased invariance and the large receptive fields of top-level nodes can only yield smooth responses. As illustrated in Fig. 5, DCNN score maps can predict the presence and rough position of objects but cannot really delineate their borders.
items.zh: 定位精度与分类性能之间的权衡似乎是DCNN固有的：具有多个最大池化层的更深层模型在分类任务中已被证明最为成功，但增加的不变性和顶层节点的大感受野只能产生平滑的响应。如图5所示，DCNN得分图可以预测物体的存在和大致位置，但无法真正描绘其边界。

items.en: Previous work has pursued two directions to address this localization challenge. The first approach is to harness information from multiple layers in the convolutional network in order to better estimate the object boundaries [21, 14, 52]. The second is to employ a super-pixel representation, essentially delegating the localization task to a low-level segmentation method [50].
items.zh: 先前的工作在解决这一定位挑战方面遵循了两个方向。第一种方法是利用卷积网络中多个层的信息来更好地估计物体边界[21, 14, 52]。第二种方法是采用超像素表示，基本上将定位任务委托给低级分割方法[50]。

items.en: We pursue an alternative direction based on coupling the recognition capacity of DCNNs and the fine-grained localization accuracy of fully connected CRFs and show that it is remarkably successful in addressing the localization challenge, producing accurate semantic segmentation results and recovering object boundaries at a level of detail that is well beyond the reach of existing methods. This direction has been extended by several follow-up papers [58, 65, 59, 60, 61, 62, 40, 17, 63], since the first version of our work was published [38].
items.zh: 我们追求另一种方向，基于耦合DCNN的识别能力和全连接CRF的细粒度定位精度，并表明它在解决定位挑战方面非常成功，能够产生准确的语义分割结果，并以远超现有方法所能达到的细节水平恢复物体边界。自我们工作的第一个版本发表以来[38]，这一方向已被多篇后续论文扩展[58, 65, 59, 60, 61, 62, 40, 17, 63]。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Score map (input before softmax function) and belief map (output of softmax function) for Aeroplane. We show the score (1st row) and belief (2nd row) maps after each mean field iteration. The output of last DCNN layer is used as input to the mean field inference.
items.capZh: 图5：飞机类别的得分图（softmax函数前的输入）和置信图（softmax函数的输出）。我们展示了每次平均场迭代后的得分图（第一行）和置信图（第二行）。最后一个DCNN层的输出用作平均场推理的输入。

items.en: Traditionally, conditional random fields (CRFs) have been employed to smooth noisy segmentation maps [23, 31]. Typically these models couple neighboring nodes, favoring same-label assignments to spatially proximal pixels. Qualitatively, the primary function of these short-range CRFs is to clean up the spurious predictions of weak classifiers built on top of local hand-engineered features.
items.zh: 传统上，条件随机场（CRF）被用于平滑噪声分割图[23, 31]。通常，这些模型耦合相邻节点，倾向于为空间邻近的像素分配相同标签。从定性上讲，这些短程CRF的主要功能是清理基于局部手工特征构建的弱分类器的虚假预测。

items.en: Compared to these weaker classifiers, modern DCNN architectures such as the one we use in this work produce score maps and semantic label predictions which are qualitatively different. As illustrated in Fig. 5, the score maps are typically quite smooth and produce homogeneous classification results. In this regime, using short-range CRFs can be detrimental, as our goal should be to recover detailed local structure rather than further smooth it. Using contrast-sensitive potentials [23] in conjunction to local-range CRFs can potentially improve localization but still miss thin-structures and typically requires solving an expensive discrete optimization problem.
items.zh: 与这些较弱的分类器相比，现代DCNN架构（如我们在本工作中使用的）产生的得分图和语义标签预测在性质上有所不同。如图5所示，得分图通常相当平滑并产生同质的分类结果。在这种情况下，使用短程CRF可能是有害的，因为我们的目标应该是恢复详细的局部结构，而不是进一步平滑它。将对比敏感势[23]与局部范围CRF结合使用可能改善定位，但仍会遗漏细长结构，并且通常需要解决一个昂贵的离散优化问题。

items.en: To overcome these limitations of short-range CRFs, we integrate into our system the fully connected CRF model of [22]. The model employs the energy function
items.zh: 为了克服短程CRF的这些局限性，我们将[22]的全连接CRF模型集成到我们的系统中。该模型使用能量函数

items.en: where 𝒙𝒙\boldsymbol{x} is the label assignment for pixels. We use as unary potential θi​(xi)=−log⁡P​(xi)subscript𝜃𝑖subscript𝑥𝑖𝑃subscript𝑥𝑖\theta_{i}(x_{i})=-\log P(x_{i}), where P​(xi)𝑃subscript𝑥𝑖P(x_{i}) is the label assignment probability at pixel i𝑖i as computed by a DCNN. The pairwise potential has a form that allows for efficient inference while using a fully-connected graph, i.e. when connecting all pairs of image pixels, i,j𝑖𝑗i,j. In particular, as in [22], we use the following expression:
items.zh: 其中 𝒙𝒙\boldsymbol{x} 是像素的标签分配。我们使用一元势 θi​(xi)=−log⁡P​(xi)\theta_{i}(x_{i}) = -\log P(x_{i})，其中 P​(xi)P(x_{i}) 是由 DCNN 计算的像素 i 的标签分配概率。成对势的形式允许在使用全连接图（即连接所有图像像素对 i,j）时进行高效推理。具体来说，如 [22] 所述，我们使用以下表达式：

items.en: where μ​(xi,xj)=1​ if ​xi≠xj𝜇subscript𝑥𝑖subscript𝑥𝑗1 if subscript𝑥𝑖subscript𝑥𝑗\mu(x_{i},x_{j})=1\text{ if }x_{i}\neq x_{j}, and zero otherwise, which, as in the Potts model, means that only nodes with distinct labels are penalized. The remaining expression uses two Gaussian kernels in different feature spaces; the first, ‘bilateral’ kernel depends on both pixel positions (denoted as p𝑝p) and RGB color (denoted as I𝐼I), and the second kernel only depends on pixel positions. The hyper parameters σαsubscript𝜎𝛼\sigma_{\alpha}, σβsubscript𝜎𝛽\sigma_{\beta} and σγsubscript𝜎𝛾\sigma_{\gamma} control the scale of Gaussian kernels. The first kernel forces pixels with similar color and position to have similar labels, while the second kernel only considers spatial proximity when enforcing smoothness.
items.zh: 其中 μ​(xi,xj)=1 若 xi≠xj\mu(x_{i}, x_{j}) = 1 \text{ if } x_{i} \neq x_{j}，否则为零，这类似于 Potts 模型，意味着只有标签不同的节点受到惩罚。其余表达式在两个不同的特征空间中使用两个高斯核；第一个“双边”核依赖于像素位置（记为 p）和 RGB 颜色（记为 I），第二个核仅依赖于像素位置。超参数 σα\sigma_{\alpha}、σβ\sigma_{\beta} 和 σγ\sigma_{\gamma} 控制高斯核的尺度。第一个核强制颜色和位置相似的像素具有相似的标签，而第二个核在强制平滑时仅考虑空间邻近性。

items.en: Crucially, this model is amenable to efficient approximate probabilistic inference [22]. The message passing updates under a fully decomposable mean field approximation b​(𝒙)=∏ibi​(xi)𝑏𝒙subscriptproduct𝑖subscript𝑏𝑖subscript𝑥𝑖b(\boldsymbol{x})=\prod_{i}b_{i}(x_{i}) can be expressed as Gaussian convolutions in bilateral space. High-dimensional filtering algorithms [84] significantly speed-up this computation resulting in an algorithm that is very fast in practice, requiring less that 0.5 sec on average for Pascal VOC images using the publicly available implementation of [22].
items.zh: 关键的是，该模型适用于高效的近似概率推理 [22]。在完全可分解的平均场近似 b​(𝒙)=∏ibi​(xi)b(\boldsymbol{x}) = \prod_{i} b_{i}(x_{i}) 下，消息传递更新可以表示为双边空间中的高斯卷积。高维滤波算法 [84] 显著加速了这一计算，使得算法在实践中非常快速，使用 [22] 的公开实现，Pascal VOC 图像平均耗时不到 0.5 秒。

items.en: We finetune the model weights of the Imagenet-pretrained VGG-16 or ResNet-101 networks to adapt them to the semantic segmentation task in a straightforward fashion, following the procedure of [14]. We replace the 1000-way Imagenet classifier in the last layer with a classifier having as many targets as the number of semantic classes of our task (including the background, if applicable). Our loss function is the sum of cross-entropy terms for each spatial position in the CNN output map (subsampled by 8 compared to the original image). All positions and labels are equally weighted in the overall loss function (except for unlabeled pixels which are ignored). Our targets are the ground truth labels (subsampled by 8). We optimize the objective function with respect to the weights at all network layers by the standard SGD procedure of [2]. We decouple the DCNN and CRF training stages, assuming the DCNN unary terms are fixed when setting the CRF parameters.
items.zh: 我们微调了 ImageNet 预训练的 VGG-16 或 ResNet-101 网络的模型权重，以直接适应语义分割任务，遵循 [14] 的过程。我们将最后一层中的 1000 路 ImageNet 分类器替换为具有与任务语义类别数量相同目标的分类器（包括背景，如果适用）。我们的损失函数是 CNN 输出图中每个空间位置（相对于原始图像下采样 8 倍）的交叉熵项之和。所有位置和标签在整体损失函数中权重相等（未标记像素除外）。我们的目标是真实标签（下采样 8 倍）。我们通过 [2] 的标准 SGD 过程优化所有网络层权重的目标函数。我们将 DCNN 和 CRF 训练阶段解耦，假设在设置 CRF 参数时 DCNN 一元项是固定的。

items.en: We evaluate the proposed models on four challenging datasets: PASCAL VOC 2012, PASCAL-Context, PASCAL-Person-Part, and Cityscapes. We first report the main results of our conference version [38] on PASCAL VOC 2012, and move forward to latest results on all datasets.
items.zh: 我们在四个具有挑战性的数据集上评估了所提出的模型：PASCAL VOC 2012、PASCAL-Context、PASCAL-Person-Part 和 Cityscapes。我们首先报告会议版本 [38] 在 PASCAL VOC 2012 上的主要结果，然后介绍所有数据集上的最新结果。

items.en: Dataset: The PASCAL VOC 2012 segmentation benchmark [34] involves 20 foreground object classes and one background class. The original dataset contains 1,46414641,464 (train), 1,44914491,449 (val), and 1,45614561,456 (test) pixel-level labeled images for training, validation, and testing, respectively. The dataset is augmented by the extra annotations provided by [85], resulting in 10,5821058210,582 (trainaug) training images. The performance is measured in terms of pixel intersection-over-union (IOU) averaged across the 21 classes.
items.zh: 数据集：PASCAL VOC 2012 分割基准 [34] 包含 20 个前景对象类和一个背景类。原始数据集包含 1,464（训练）、1,449（验证）和 1,456（测试）张像素级标记图像，分别用于训练、验证和测试。数据集通过 [85] 提供的额外标注进行增强，得到 10,582（trainaug）张训练图像。性能以 21 个类别的平均像素交并比（IOU）衡量。

items.en: We employ the VGG-16 network pre-trained on Imagenet, adapted for semantic segmentation as described in Section 3.1. We use a mini-batch of 20 images and initial learning rate of 0.0010.0010.001 (0.010.010.01 for the final classifier layer), multiplying the learning rate by 0.1 every 2000 iterations. We use momentum of 0.90.90.9 and weight decay of 0.00050.00050.0005.
items.zh: 我们采用在 ImageNet 上预训练的 VGG-16 网络，并按照第 3.1 节所述进行语义分割适应。我们使用小批量 20 张图像，初始学习率为 0.001（最终分类器层为 0.01），每 2000 次迭代将学习率乘以 0.1。我们使用动量 0.9 和权重衰减 0.0005。

items.en: After the DCNN has been fine-tuned on trainaug, we cross-validate the CRF parameters along the lines of [22]. We use default values of w2=3subscript𝑤23w_{2}=3 and σγ=3subscript𝜎𝛾3\sigma_{\gamma}=3 and we search for the best values of w1subscript𝑤1w_{1}, σαsubscript𝜎𝛼\sigma_{\alpha}, and σβsubscript𝜎𝛽\sigma_{\beta} by cross-validation on 100 images from val. We employ a coarse-to-fine search scheme. The initial search range of the parameters are w1∈[3:6]w_{1}\in[3:6], σα∈[30:10:100]\sigma_{\alpha}\in[30:10:100] and σβ∈[3:6]\sigma_{\beta}\in[3:6] (MATLAB notation), and then we refine the search step sizes around the first round’s best values. We employ 10 mean field iterations.
items.zh: 在 DCNN 在 trainaug 上微调后，我们按照 [22] 的方法交叉验证 CRF 参数。我们使用默认值 w2=3 和 σγ=3，并通过在 val 的 100 张图像上进行交叉验证来搜索 w1、σα 和 σβ 的最佳值。我们采用从粗到细的搜索方案。参数的初始搜索范围为 w1∈[3:6]、σα∈[30:10:100] 和 σβ∈[3:6]（MATLAB 表示法），然后围绕第一轮最佳值细化搜索步长。我们使用 10 次平均场迭代。

items.en: Field of View and CRF: In Tab. I, we report experiments with DeepLab model variants that use different field-of-view sizes, obtained by adjusting the kernel size and atrous sampling rate r𝑟r in the ‘fc6’ layer, as described in Sec. 3.1. We start with a direct adaptation of VGG-16 net, using the original 7×7777\!\times\!7 kernel size and r=4𝑟4r=4 (since we use no stride for the last two max-pooling layers). This model yields performance of 67.64%percent67.6467.64\% after CRF, but is relatively slow (1.441.441.44 images per second during training). We have improved model speed to 2.92.92.9 images per second by reducing the kernel size to 4×4444\!\times\!4. We have experimented with two such network variants with smaller (r=4𝑟4r=4) and larger (r=8𝑟8r=8) FOV sizes; the latter one performs better. Finally, we employ kernel size 3×3333\!\times\!3 and even larger atrous sampling rate (r=12𝑟12r=12), also making the network thinner by retaining a random subset of 1,024 out of the 4,096 filters in layers ‘fc6’ and ‘fc7’. The resulting model, DeepLab-CRF-LargeFOV, matches the performance of the direct VGG-16 adaptation (7×7777\!\times\!7 kernel size, r=4𝑟4r=4). At the same time, DeepLab-LargeFOV is 3.363.363.36 times faster and has significantly fewer parameters (20.5M instead of 134.3M).
items.zh: 视野和 CRF：在表 I 中，我们报告了使用不同视野大小的 DeepLab 模型变体的实验，这些变体通过调整 'fc6' 层中的核大小和空洞采样率 r 获得，如第 3.1 节所述。我们从 VGG-16 网络的直接适应开始，使用原始 7×7 核大小和 r=4（因为我们最后两个最大池化层不使用步长）。该模型在 CRF 后性能为 67.64%，但相对较慢（训练时每秒 1.44 张图像）。通过将核大小减小到 4×4，我们将模型速度提高到每秒 2.9 张图像。我们实验了两种这样的网络变体，分别具有较小（r=4）和较大（r=8）的 FOV 大小；后者性能更好。最后，我们使用核大小 3×3 和更大的空洞采样率（r=12），并通过在 'fc6' 和 'fc7' 层中保留 4,096 个滤波器中的随机子集 1,024 个来使网络更薄。得到的模型 DeepLab-CRF-LargeFOV 与直接 VGG-16 适应（7×7 核大小，r=4）的性能相匹配。同时，DeepLab-LargeFOV 速度快 3.36 倍，参数显著减少（20.5M 对比 134.3M）。

items.en: The CRF substantially boosts performance of all model variants, offering a 3-5% absolute increase in mean IOU.
items.zh: CRF 显著提升了所有模型变体的性能，平均 IOU 绝对提高了 3-5%。

items.en: Test set evaluation: We have evaluated our DeepLab-CRF-LargeFOV model on the PASCAL VOC 2012 official test set. It achieves 70.3%percent70.370.3\% mean IOU performance.
items.zh: 测试集评估：我们在 PASCAL VOC 2012 官方测试集上评估了 DeepLab-CRF-LargeFOV 模型。它达到了 70.3% 的平均 IOU 性能。

items.capEn: Figure 6: PASCAL VOC 2012 val results. Input image and our DeepLab results before/after CRF.
items.capZh: 图 6：PASCAL VOC 2012 val 结果。输入图像以及我们 DeepLab 在 CRF 前后的结果。

items.en: After the conference version of this work [38], we have pursued three main improvements of our model, which we discuss below: (1) different learning policy during training, (2) atrous spatial pyramid pooling, and (3) employment of deeper networks and multi-scale processing.
items.zh: 在本工作的会议版本 [38] 之后，我们追求了模型的三个主要改进，下面讨论：（1）训练期间不同的学习策略，（2）空洞空间金字塔池化，以及（3）使用更深的网络和多尺度处理。

items.en: Learning rate policy: We have explored different learning rate policies when training DeepLab-LargeFOV. Similar to [86], we also found that employing a “poly” learning rate policy (the learning rate is multiplied by (1−i​t​e​rm​a​x​_​i​t​e​r)p​o​w​e​rsuperscript1𝑖𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑚𝑎𝑥_𝑖𝑡𝑒𝑟𝑝𝑜𝑤𝑒𝑟(1-\frac{iter}{max\_iter})^{power}) is more effective than “step” learning rate (reduce the learning rate at a fixed step size). As shown in Tab. II, employing “poly” (with p​o​w​e​r=0.9𝑝𝑜𝑤𝑒𝑟0.9power=0.9) and using the same batch size and same training iterations yields 1.17% better performance than employing “step” policy. Fixing the batch size and increasing the training iteration to 10K improves the performance to 64.90% (1.48% gain); however, the total training time increases due to more training iterations. We then reduce the batch size to 10 and found that comparable performance is still maintained (64.90% vs. 64.71%). In the end, we employ batch size = 10 and 20K iterations in order to maintain similar training time as previous “step” policy. Surprisingly, this gives us the performance of 65.88% (3.63% improvement over “step”) on val, and 67.7% on test, compared to 65.1% of the original “step” setting for DeepLab-LargeFOV before CRF. We employ the “poly” learning rate policy for all experiments reported in the rest of the paper.
items.zh: 学习率策略：我们在训练 DeepLab-LargeFOV 时探索了不同的学习率策略。与 [86] 类似，我们发现采用“poly”学习率策略（学习率乘以 (1−iter/max_iter)^power）比“step”学习率（在固定步长处降低学习率）更有效。如表 II 所示，采用“poly”（power=0.9）并使用相同的批量大小和相同的训练迭代次数，比采用“step”策略性能提高 1.17%。固定批量大小并将训练迭代次数增加到 10K，性能提高到 64.90%（提升 1.48%）；然而，由于训练迭代次数增加，总训练时间增加。然后我们将批量大小减少到 10，发现仍保持可比的性能（64.90% 对比 64.71%）。最后，我们采用批量大小 = 10 和 20K 迭代，以保持与之前“step”策略相似的训练时间。令人惊讶的是，这在 val 上给出了 65.88% 的性能（比“step”提升 3.63%），在 test 上为 67.7%，而原始“step”设置下 DeepLab-LargeFOV 在 CRF 前为 65.1%。我们在本文其余部分报告的所有实验中均采用“poly”学习率策略。

items.capEn: Figure 7: DeepLab-ASPP employs multiple filters with different rates to capture objects and context at multiple scales.
items.capZh: 图 7：DeepLab-ASPP 使用多个不同率的滤波器来捕获多尺度的对象和上下文。

items.en: Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling: We have experimented with the proposed Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) scheme, described in Sec. 3.1. As shown in Fig. 7, ASPP for VGG-16 employs several parallel fc6-fc7-fc8 branches. They all use 3×3333\!\times\!3 kernels but different atrous rates r𝑟r in the ‘fc6’ in order to capture objects of different size. In Tab. III, we report results with several settings: (1) Our baseline LargeFOV model, having a single branch with r=12𝑟12r=12, (2) ASPP-S, with four branches and smaller atrous rates (r𝑟r = {2, 4, 8, 12}), and (3) ASPP-L, with four branches and larger rates (r𝑟r = {6, 12, 18, 24}). For each variant we report results before and after CRF. As shown in the table, ASPP-S yields 1.22% improvement over the baseline LargeFOV before CRF. However, after CRF both LargeFOV and ASPP-S perform similarly. On the other hand, ASPP-L yields consistent improvements over the baseline LargeFOV both before and after CRF. We evaluate on test the proposed ASPP-L + CRF model, attaining 72.6%. We visualize the effect of the different schemes in Fig. 8.
items.zh: 空洞空间金字塔池化：我们实验了所提出的空洞空间金字塔池化（ASPP）方案，如第 3.1 节所述。如图 7 所示，VGG-16 的 ASPP 使用多个并行的 fc6-fc7-fc8 分支。它们都使用 3×3 核，但在 'fc6' 中使用不同的空洞率 r 以捕获不同大小的对象。在表 III 中，我们报告了几种设置的结果：（1）我们的基线 LargeFOV 模型，具有单个分支，r=12，（2）ASPP-S，具有四个分支和较小的空洞率（r = {2, 4, 8, 12}），以及（3）ASPP-L，具有四个分支和较大的率（r = {6, 12, 18, 24}）。对于每个变体，我们报告 CRF 前后的结果。如表所示，ASPP-S 在 CRF 前比基线 LargeFOV 提高了 1.22%。然而，在 CRF 后，LargeFOV 和 ASPP-S 表现相似。另一方面，ASPP-L 在 CRF 前后均比基线 LargeFOV 有一致的改进。我们在测试集上评估了所提出的 ASPP-L + CRF 模型，达到 72.6%。我们在图 8 中可视化了不同方案的效果。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Qualitative segmentation results with ASPP compared to the baseline LargeFOV model. The ASPP-L model, employing multiple large FOVs can successfully capture objects as well as image context at multiple scales.
items.capZh: 图 8：使用 ASPP 与基线 LargeFOV 模型的定性分割结果。ASPP-L 模型采用多个大 FOV，可以成功捕获对象以及多尺度的图像上下文。

items.en: Deeper Networks and Multiscale Processing: We have experimented building DeepLab around the recently proposed residual net ResNet-101 [11] instead of VGG-16. Similar to what we did for VGG-16 net, we re-purpose ResNet-101 by atrous convolution, as described in Sec. 3.1. On top of that, we adopt several other features, following recent work of [39, 58, 59, 62, 40, 17, 18]: (1) Multi-scale inputs: We separately feed to the DCNN images at scale = {0.5, 0.75, 1}, fusing their score maps by taking the maximum response across scales for each position separately [17]. (2) Models pretrained on MS-COCO [87]. (3) Data augmentation by randomly scaling the input images (from 0.5 to 1.5) during training. In Tab. IV, we evaluate how each of these factors, along with LargeFOV and atrous spatial pyramid pooling (ASPP), affects val set performance. Adopting ResNet-101 instead of VGG-16 significantly improves DeepLab performance (e.g., our simplest ResNet-101 based model attains 68.72%, compared to 65.76% of our DeepLab-LargeFOV VGG-16 based variant, both before CRF). Multiscale fusion [17] brings extra 2.55% improvement, while pretraining the model on MS-COCO gives another 2.01% gain. Data augmentation during training is effective (about 1.6% improvement). Employing LargeFOV (adding an atrous convolutional layer on top of ResNet, with 3×3333\!\times\!3 kernel and rate = 12) is beneficial (about 0.6% improvement). Further 0.8% improvement is achieved by atrous spatial pyramid pooling (ASPP). Post-processing our best model by dense CRF yields performance of 77.69%.
items.zh: 更深的网络和多尺度处理：我们实验了围绕最近提出的残差网络 ResNet-101 [11] 构建 DeepLab，而不是 VGG-16。类似于我们对 VGG-16 网络所做的，我们通过空洞卷积重新利用 ResNet-101，如第 3.1 节所述。在此基础上，我们采用了其他几个特征，遵循最近的工作 [39, 58, 59, 62, 40, 17, 18]：（1）多尺度输入：我们分别向 DCNN 输入尺度为 {0.5, 0.75, 1} 的图像，通过分别取每个位置跨尺度的最大响应来融合它们的得分图 [17]。（2）在 MS-COCO [87] 上预训练的模型。（3）通过在训练期间随机缩放输入图像（从 0.5 到 1.5）进行数据增强。在表 IV 中，我们评估了这些因素以及 LargeFOV 和空洞空间金字塔池化（ASPP）如何影响 val 集性能。采用 ResNet-101 代替 VGG-16 显著提高了 DeepLab 性能（例如，我们最简单的基于 ResNet-101 的模型在 CRF 前达到 68.72%，而基于 VGG-16 的 DeepLab-LargeFOV 变体为 65.76%）。多尺度融合 [17] 带来了额外的 2.55% 改进，而在 MS-COCO 上预训练模型又带来了 2.01% 的提升。训练期间的数据增强是有效的（约 1.6% 改进）。采用 LargeFOV（在 ResNet 之上添加一个空洞卷积层，使用 3×3 核和率 = 12）是有益的（约 0.6% 改进）。空洞空间金字塔池化（ASPP）进一步实现了 0.8% 的改进。通过密集 CRF 后处理我们的最佳模型，性能达到 77.69%。

items.en: Qualitative results: We provide qualitative visual comparisons of DeepLab’s results (our best model variant) before and after CRF in Fig. 6. The visualization results obtained by DeepLab before CRF already yields excellent segmentation results, while employing the CRF further improves the performance by removing false positives and refining object boundaries.
items.zh: 定性结果：我们在图 6 中提供了 DeepLab 结果（我们的最佳模型变体）在 CRF 前后的定性视觉比较。DeepLab 在 CRF 前获得的可视化结果已经产生了出色的分割结果，而使用 CRF 通过去除假阳性并细化对象边界进一步提高了性能。

items.en: Test set results: We have submitted the result of our final best model to the official server, obtaining test set performance of 79.7%, as shown in Tab. V. The model substantially outperforms previous DeepLab variants (e.g., DeepLab-LargeFOV with VGG-16 net) and is currently the top performing method on the PASCAL VOC 2012 segmentation leaderboard.
items.zh: 测试集结果：我们将最终最佳模型的结果提交给官方服务器，获得测试集性能 79.7%，如表 V 所示。该模型显著优于之前的 DeepLab 变体（例如，使用 VGG-16 网络的 DeepLab-LargeFOV），并且目前是 PASCAL VOC 2012 分割排行榜上表现最好的方法。

items.en: VGG-16 vs. ResNet-101: We have observed that DeepLab based on ResNet-101 [11] delivers better segmentation results along object boundaries than employing VGG-16 [4], as visualized in Fig. 9. We think the identity mapping [94] of ResNet-101 has similar effect as hyper-column features [21], which exploits the features from the intermediate layers to better localize boundaries. We further quantize this effect in Fig. 10 within the “trimap” [31, 22] (a narrow band along object boundaries). As shown in the figure, employing ResNet-101 before CRF has almost the same accuracy along object boundaries as employing VGG-16 in conjunction with a CRF. Post-processing the ResNet-101 result with a CRF further improves the segmentation result.
items.zh: VGG-16 vs. ResNet-101：我们观察到，基于ResNet-101 [11]的DeepLab在物体边界处的分割结果优于使用VGG-16 [4]，如图9所示。我们认为ResNet-101的恒等映射 [94] 具有与超列特征 [21] 类似的效果，后者利用中间层的特征来更好地定位边界。我们在图10的“trimap” [31, 22]（物体边界周围的窄带）中进一步量化了这一效果。如图所示，在CRF之前使用ResNet-101在物体边界处的准确度几乎与使用VGG-16结合CRF相同。使用CRF对ResNet-101结果进行后处理进一步改善了分割结果。

items.capEn: Figure 9: DeepLab results based on VGG-16 net or ResNet-101 before and after CRF. The CRF is critical for accurate prediction along object boundaries with VGG-16, whereas ResNet-101 has acceptable performance even before CRF.
items.capZh: 图9：基于VGG-16网络或ResNet-101的DeepLab在CRF前后的结果。对于VGG-16，CRF对于沿物体边界的准确预测至关重要，而ResNet-101即使在CRF之前也具有可接受的性能。

items.capEn: Figure 10: (a) Trimap examples (top-left: image. top-right: ground-truth. bottom-left: trimap of 2 pixels. bottom-right: trimap of 10 pixels). (b) Pixel mean IOU as a function of the band width around the object boundaries when employing VGG-16 or ResNet-101 before and after CRF.
items.capZh: 图10：(a) Trimap示例（左上：图像。右上：真实标注。左下：2像素的trimap。右下：10像素的trimap）。(b) 使用VGG-16或ResNet-101在CRF前后，像素平均IoU随物体边界周围带宽度的变化。

items.capEn: Figure 11: PASCAL-Context results. Input image, ground-truth, and our DeepLab results before/after CRF.
items.capZh: 图11：PASCAL-Context结果。输入图像、真实标注以及我们的DeepLab在CRF前后的结果。

items.en: Dataset: The PASCAL-Context dataset [35] provides detailed semantic labels for the whole scene, including both object (e.g., person) and stuff (e.g., sky). Following [35], the proposed models are evaluated on the most frequent 59 classes along with one background category. The training set and validation set contain 4998 and 5105 images.
items.zh: 数据集：PASCAL-Context数据集 [35] 提供了整个场景的详细语义标签，包括物体（例如人）和材质（例如天空）。遵循 [35]，所提出的模型在59个最频繁的类别以及一个背景类别上进行评估。训练集和验证集分别包含4998和5105张图像。

items.en: Evaluation: We report the evaluation results in Tab. VI. Our VGG-16 based LargeFOV variant yields 37.6% before and 39.6% after CRF. Repurposing the ResNet-101 [11] for DeepLab improves 2% over the VGG-16 LargeFOV. Similar to [17], employing multi-scale inputs and max-pooling to merge the results improves the performance to 41.4%. Pretraining the model on MS-COCO brings extra 1.5% improvement. Employing atrous spatial pyramid pooling is more effective than LargeFOV. After further employing dense CRF as post processing, our final model yields 45.7%, outperforming the current state-of-art method [40] by 2.4% without using their non-linear pairwise term. Our final model is slightly better than the concurrent work [93] by 1.2%, which also employs atrous convolution to repurpose the residual net of [11] for semantic segmentation.
items.zh: 评估：我们在表VI中报告了评估结果。基于VGG-16的LargeFOV变体在CRF前后分别达到37.6%和39.6%。将ResNet-101 [11] 用于DeepLab比VGG-16 LargeFOV提高了2%。与 [17] 类似，使用多尺度输入和最大池化融合结果将性能提升至41.4%。在MS-COCO上预训练模型带来了额外的1.5%提升。使用空洞空间金字塔池化比LargeFOV更有效。在进一步使用密集CRF作为后处理后，我们的最终模型达到了45.7%，比当前最先进的方法 [40] 高出2.4%，且未使用其非线性成对项。我们的最终模型比同期工作 [93] 略好1.2%，该工作也使用空洞卷积将 [11] 的残差网络用于语义分割。

items.en: Qualitative results: We visualize the segmentation results of our best model with and without CRF as post processing in Fig. 11. DeepLab before CRF can already predict most of the object/stuff with high accuracy. Employing CRF, our model is able to further remove isolated false positives and improve the prediction along object/stuff boundaries.
items.zh: 定性结果：我们在图11中可视化了我们最佳模型在有和没有CRF后处理时的分割结果。CRF之前的DeepLab已经能够以高精度预测大多数物体/材质。使用CRF，我们的模型能够进一步去除孤立的假阳性，并改善沿物体/材质边界的预测。

items.capEn: Figure 12: PASCAL-Person-Part results. Input image, ground-truth, and our DeepLab results before/after CRF.
items.capZh: 图12：PASCAL-Person-Part结果。输入图像、真实标注以及我们的DeepLab在CRF前后的结果。

items.en: Dataset: We further perform experiments on semantic part segmentation [98, 99], using the extra PASCAL VOC 2010 annotations by [36]. We focus on the person part for the dataset, which contains more training data and large variation in object scale and human pose. Specifically, the dataset contains detailed part annotations for every person, e.g. eyes, nose. We merge the annotations to be Head, Torso, Upper/Lower Arms and Upper/Lower Legs, resulting in six person part classes and one background class. We only use those images containing persons for training (1716 images) and validation (1817 images).
items.zh: 数据集：我们进一步在语义部分分割 [98, 99] 上进行了实验，使用了 [36] 提供的额外PASCAL VOC 2010标注。我们关注数据集中的身体部位，该数据集包含更多训练数据以及物体尺度和人体姿态的大变化。具体来说，数据集包含每个人的详细部位标注，例如眼睛、鼻子。我们将标注合并为头部、躯干、上/下臂和上/下腿，得到六个身体部位类别和一个背景类别。我们仅使用包含人的图像进行训练（1716张图像）和验证（1817张图像）。

items.en: Evaluation: The human part segmentation results on PASCAL-Person-Part is reported in Tab. VII. [17] has already conducted experiments on this dataset with re-purposed VGG-16 net for DeepLab, attaining 56.39% (with multi-scale inputs). Therefore, in this part, we mainly focus on the effect of repurposing ResNet-101 for DeepLab. With ResNet-101, DeepLab alone yields 58.9%, significantly outperforming DeepLab-LargeFOV (VGG-16 net) and DeepLab-Attention (VGG-16 net) by about 7% and 2.5%, respectively. Incorporating multi-scale inputs and fusion by max-pooling further improves performance to 63.1%. Additionally pretraining the model on MS-COCO yields another 1.3% improvement. However, we do not observe any improvement when adopting either LargeFOV or ASPP on this dataset. Employing the dense CRF to post process our final output substantially outperforms the concurrent work [97] by 4.78%.
items.zh: 评估：PASCAL-Person-Part上的人体部位分割结果在表VII中报告。[17] 已经在该数据集上使用重新用于DeepLab的VGG-16网络进行了实验，达到了56.39%（使用多尺度输入）。因此，在本部分中，我们主要关注将ResNet-101用于DeepLab的效果。使用ResNet-101，仅DeepLab就达到58.9%，显著优于DeepLab-LargeFOV（VGG-16网络）和DeepLab-Attention（VGG-16网络）约7%和2.5%。结合多尺度输入和最大池化融合进一步将性能提升至63.1%。在MS-COCO上额外预训练模型又带来了1.3%的提升。然而，我们未观察到在该数据集上采用LargeFOV或ASPP有任何改进。使用密集CRF对最终输出进行后处理显著优于同期工作 [97] 4.78%。

items.en: Qualitative results: We visualize the results in Fig. 12.
items.zh: 定性结果：我们在图12中可视化了结果。

items.capEn: Figure 13: Cityscapes results. Input image, ground-truth, and our DeepLab results before/after CRF.
items.capZh: 图13：Cityscapes结果。输入图像、真实标注以及我们的DeepLab在CRF前后的结果。

items.en: Dataset: Cityscapes [37] is a recently released large-scale dataset, which contains high quality pixel-level annotations of 5000 images collected in street scenes from 50 different cities. Following the evaluation protocol [37], 19 semantic labels (belonging to 7 super categories: ground, construction, object, nature, sky, human, and vehicle) are used for evaluation (the void label is not considered for evaluation). The training, validation, and test sets contain 2975, 500, and 1525 images respectively.
items.zh: 数据集：Cityscapes [37] 是一个最近发布的大规模数据集，包含来自50个不同城市街景的5000张图像的高质量像素级标注。遵循评估协议 [37]，使用19个语义标签（属于7个超类别：地面、建筑、物体、自然、天空、人类和车辆）进行评估（void标签不参与评估）。训练集、验证集和测试集分别包含2975、500和1525张图像。

items.en: Test set results of pre-release: We have participated in benchmarking the Cityscapes dataset pre-release. As shown in the top of Tab. VIII, our model attained third place, with performance of 63.1% and 64.8% (with training on additional coarsely annotated images).
items.zh: 预发布版本的测试集结果：我们参与了Cityscapes数据集预发布版本的基准测试。如表VIII顶部所示，我们的模型以63.1%和64.8%（使用额外粗略标注图像训练）的性能获得第三名。

items.en: Val set results: After the initial release, we further explored the validation set in Tab. IX. The images of Cityscapes have resolution 2048×1024204810242048\!\times\!1024, making it a challenging problem to train deeper networks with limited GPU memory. During benchmarking the pre-release of the dataset, we downsampled the images by 2. However, we have found that it is beneficial to process the images in their original resolution. With the same training protocol, using images of original resolution significantly brings 1.9% and 1.8% improvements before and after CRF, respectively. In order to perform inference on this dataset with high resolution images, we split each image into overlapped regions, similar to [37]. We have also replaced the VGG-16 net with ResNet-101. We do not exploit multi-scale inputs due to the limited GPU memories at hand. Instead, we only explore (1) deeper networks (i.e., ResNet-101), (2) data augmentation, (3) LargeFOV or ASPP, and (4) CRF as post processing on this dataset. We first find that employing ResNet-101 alone is better than using VGG-16 net. Employing LargeFOV brings 2.6% improvement and using ASPP further improves results by 1.2%. Adopting data augmentation and CRF as post processing brings another 0.6% and 0.4%, respectively.
items.zh: 验证集结果：初始发布后，我们进一步在表IX中探索了验证集。Cityscapes图像的分辨率为2048×1024，这使得在有限GPU内存下训练更深网络成为一个具有挑战性的问题。在数据集预发布版本的基准测试期间，我们将图像下采样了2倍。然而，我们发现以原始分辨率处理图像是有益的。使用相同的训练协议，使用原始分辨率图像在CRF前后分别显著提升了1.9%和1.8%。为了在此高分辨率图像数据集上进行推理，我们将每张图像分割成重叠区域，类似于 [37]。我们还将VGG-16网络替换为ResNet-101。由于手头GPU内存有限，我们没有利用多尺度输入。相反，我们仅探索了（1）更深网络（即ResNet-101），（2）数据增强，（3）LargeFOV或ASPP，以及（4）CRF后处理。我们首先发现仅使用ResNet-101优于使用VGG-16网络。采用LargeFOV带来了2.6%的提升，使用ASPP进一步提升了1.2%。采用数据增强和CRF后处理分别带来了0.6%和0.4%的提升。

items.en: Current test result: We have uploaded our best model to the evaluation server, obtaining performance of 70.4%. Note that our model is only trained on the train set.
items.zh: 当前测试结果：我们将最佳模型上传到评估服务器，获得了70.4%的性能。请注意，我们的模型仅在训练集上训练。

items.en: Qualitative results: We visualize the results in Fig. 13.
items.zh: 定性结果：我们在图13中可视化了结果。

items.en: We further qualitatively analyze some failure modes of our best model variant on PASCAL VOC 2012 val set. As shown in Fig. 14, our proposed model fails to capture the delicate boundaries of objects, such as bicycle and chair. The details could not even be recovered by the CRF post processing since the unary term is not confident enough. We hypothesize the encoder-decoder structure of [100, 102] may alleviate the problem by exploiting the high resolution feature maps in the decoder path. How to efficiently incorporate the method is left as a future work.
items.zh: 我们进一步定性地分析了最佳模型变体在PASCAL VOC 2012验证集上的一些失败模式。如图14所示，我们提出的模型未能捕捉到物体的精细边界，例如自行车和椅子。由于一元项不够自信，CRF后处理甚至无法恢复细节。我们假设 [100, 102] 的编码器-解码器结构可以通过利用解码器路径中的高分辨率特征图来缓解该问题。如何有效整合该方法留作未来工作。

items.capEn: Figure 14: Failure modes. Input image, ground-truth, and our DeepLab results before/after CRF.
items.capZh: 图14：失败模式。输入图像、真实标注以及我们的DeepLab在CRF前后的结果。

items.en: Our proposed “DeepLab” system re-purposes networks trained on image classification to the task of semantic segmentation by applying the ‘atrous convolution’ with upsampled filters for dense feature extraction. We further extend it to atrous spatial pyramid pooling, which encodes objects as well as image context at multiple scales. To produce semantically accurate predictions and detailed segmentation maps along object boundaries, we also combine ideas from deep convolutional neural networks and fully-connected conditional random fields. Our experimental results show that the proposed method significantly advances the state-of-art in several challenging datasets, including PASCAL VOC 2012 semantic image segmentation benchmark, PASCAL-Context, PASCAL-Person-Part, and Cityscapes datasets.
items.zh: 我们提出的“DeepLab”系统通过应用带有上采样滤波器的“空洞卷积”进行密集特征提取，将图像分类训练的网络重新用于语义分割任务。我们进一步将其扩展到空洞空间金字塔池化，该池化在多个尺度上对物体和图像上下文进行编码。为了产生语义上准确的预测和沿物体边界的详细分割图，我们还结合了深度卷积神经网络和全连接条件随机场的思想。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的方法在多个具有挑战性的数据集上显著推进了最先进水平，包括PASCAL VOC 2012语义图像分割基准、PASCAL-Context、PASCAL-Person-Part和Cityscapes数据集。
